introSection: Speedy Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Ocean Beach Pleasure Park in South Shields, Tyne & Wear, England, UK.
fullText: Speedy Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Ocean Beach Pleasure Park in South Shields, Tyne & Wear, England, UK.
